reason: All four acceptance criteria satisfied by the plan updates and decision-format docs created in the prior planning session.

Research complete. Version matrix documented in bng-18-version-matrix.md. Key finding: no older-CMake-compatible Bungee exists; all releases require cmake 3.30...3.31. API identical v2.4.15→v2.4.24. vcpkg port at 2.4.15 in microsoft/vcpkg but not yet in mixxxdj/vcpkg. Decision needed for CMake<3.30 behavior documented with pros/cons.

CMakeLists.txt BUNGEE block restructured: tries Bungee CONFIG, unofficial-bungee CONFIG (vcpkg), then FindBungee MODULE, with vendored lib/bungee/ as labelled fallback. Vendored fallback normalizes to Bungee::Bungee ALIAS. All downstream links use Bungee::Bungee. BUNGEE=OFF verified clean. FindBungee.cmake updated to use libbungee pkg-config module name and add bungee/libbungee NAMES to find_library.

Option C implemented: cmake/vcpkg-overlay-ports/bungee/ contains a verbatim copy of microsoft/vcpkg's bungee port (v2.4.15, merge ae92331). CMakeLists.txt appends ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/vcpkg-overlay-ports to VCPKG_OVERLAY_PORTS after MIXXX_VCPKG_ROOT/overlay/* paths, so future mixxxdj/vcpkg port wins automatically. README documents provenance and removal plan for Option A migration.
Implemented ExternalProject_Add Bungee source-fetch fallback pinned to v2.4.15 with CMake-version warning; both -DBUNGEE=ON and -DBUNGEE=OFF configure clean; patches apply against v2.4.15 tarball.
Starting BNG-25: Add Eigen3 + pffft as ExternalProject_Add targets

BNG-25 complete: Eigen 3.4.0 + pffft 02fe7715 ExternalProject_Add targets added inside BUNGEE_FETCH_FALLBACK branch; smoke artifacts verified (Eigen3Config.cmake, pffftConfig.cmake, libpffft.a); Bungee v2.4.15 compiles clean against Eigen 3.4.0 stable (no fallback to c29c8001 needed); BUNGEE=OFF and BUNGEE_FETCH_FALLBACK=OFF both clean; adversarial review pass complete (1 nit fixed, 3 false-positive findings about ticket-move workflow handled by orchestration sequence)
Starting BNG-26 wiring work per handoff.

BNG-26 complete: ExternalProject Eigen3/pffft targets wired into bungee_external; manual imported targets added; missing patch/provider now fail hard; source-fetch bungee_external and mixxx-lib validations passed.
Starting BNG-22 vendored lib/bungee removal after BNG-26 completion.
BNG-22 complete: removed tracked lib/bungee source, deleted vendored CMake fallback wiring, updated live docs, and validated source-fetch bungee_external plus mixxx-lib.
